title: R3: Memory System Code Review
summary: Deep code review of CLEO brain.db memory system. Found 96.7% duplicate patterns (2467 total, 82 unique), empty dedup blocks in patterns.ts and learnings.ts, dead embedding system (sqlite-vec not installed, vec0 table missing), empty graph tables (0 nodes/edges), 5 distinct auto-generation noise sources with exact file:line citations, and full working vs broken feature matrix.

title: R2: LadybugDB Architecture Study
summary: LadybugDB is a KuzuDB fork — a C++ embedded property graph database with Cypher, columnar storage, ACID, vector/FTS extensions. Not a purpose-built AI memory system. Key adoptions for CLEO: typed node+edge schema (activate brain_page_nodes/edges), recursive CTE traversal, typed relationship cardinality, quality scoring column, content-hash dedup enforcement, contradiction detection. LadybugDB itself not recommended as direct CLEO dependency — SQLite + graph patterns is the correct path.
key_innovations: Property graph model with CREATE NODE TABLE / CREATE REL TABLE
FLOAT[N] array type for embedding vectors
CSR adjacency list for O(1) neighbor lookup
GDS algorithms (BFS, Dijkstra, all-shortest-paths) as built-in functions
Extension architecture (vector HNSW, FTS, LLM, foreign DBs)

title: R: GitNexus Pipeline Architecture Study
summary: Full study of GitNexus 14-phase ingestion pipeline. Maps all phases, data structures, node/relation types, language providers, community detection (Leiden), process detection (BFS), and Drizzle/SQLite porting strategy. Includes gap analysis vs T506 foundations and recommended 16-step port sequence.

title: R1: Brain.db Forensic Audit
summary: Forensic audit of brain.db. Total ~2,955 entries, SNR=0.95%. Patterns: 2,470 total, 2,466 auto-gen label duplicates (29 distinct labels, 0-236 copies each), 4 test entries, 0 useful. Learnings: 329 total, 281 Completed: echoes, 46 dependency chain records, 3 test entries, 0 genuine insights. Decisions: 5 total, 4 test, 1 real (CLI-only dispatch). Observations: ~151 total, 64 task-start events, 29 session notes, 25 test junk, 6 task-complete events, 27 real insights. Graph: 0 nodes, 0 edges — never populated. Root causes: no dedup guard on pattern hook, learning hook captures no intelligence, observation store used as operational log, zero test hygiene. Purge targets: 2,441 pattern dupes, 330 learnings, 4 decisions, 124 observations. Post-purge estimate: ~57 entries remaining.

title: CA2: Memory SDK Specification
summary: Graph-native Cleo Memory SDK specification. Adopts Option C (Hybrid): typed tables preserved, brain_page_nodes/edges extended to mirror and relate all entities. Schema additions: 12 node types, 13 edge types, qualityScore, contentHash, lastActivityAt, provenance columns. Auto-population wired to 5 CANT hook events (task.complete, session.end, memory.observe, memory.decide, code.index). Full SDK API: store, query, traverse, relate, decay, consolidate, context, contradictions. Traversal via recursive CTEs. Contradiction detection: keyword-overlap Stage 1 + content-divergence Stage 2. Graph consolidation: edge-density clustering replaces keyword-overlap merging. nexus.db integration via shadow nodes and bridge edges (documents, references). 6-phase rollout plan. Stays in packages/core/src/memory/graph-sdk.ts — no new package needed.
needs_followup: M-001/M-002 Drizzle migrations to extend brain_page_nodes and brain_page_edges
populateGraphFromTypedTables() back-fill script for 57 existing entries
CANT hook wiring for auto-population

title: CA1: Brain Integrity Specification
author: CA1-brain-integrity-architect
summary: Complete specification for brain.db purge (2955→57 entries), dedup engine (upsert with frequency/confidence merge), quality scoring model (0.0-1.0 per table), hook fixes (remove 3 duplicate write paths), auto-pattern no-op redesign, embedding activation (sqlite-vec + initDefaultProvider wiring), FTS5 rebuild plan, and 4-wave implementation plan with acceptance criteria.

title: CA: Pipeline Implementation Specification
summary: Full implementation specification for porting the GitNexus pipeline into @cleocode/nexus. Covers: Drizzle schema (nexus_nodes + nexus_relations tables with full column/index definitions), contracts expansion (17 new GraphNodeKind values, 9 new GraphRelationType values, new optional GraphNode fields, SymbolTable/KnowledgeGraph/CommunityNode/ProcessNode interfaces), phase-by-phase implementation spec for all 14 phases, SymbolTable 5-index design, TypeScript import resolver with barrel/alias support, tiered call resolution (Tier 1 same-file 0.95, Tier 2a named-import 0.90, Tier 2b/3 deferred), Louvain community detection via graphology-communities-louvain, BFS process detection with entry scoring and dedup, 6 CLI commands, 6-wave implementation plan with acceptance criteria, and brain graph integration via nexus_brain_links bridge table.
key_decisions: Two unified tables (nexus_nodes + nexus_relations) instead of 28 node tables
code_index table retained alongside new graph tables for fast symbol search
Use graphology-communities-louvain instead of vendored Leiden
Call resolution MUST wait for complete HeritageMap (all chunks parsed)
Cross-DB links stored in nexus_brain_links in nexus.db (soft FK to brain.db)
Node IDs use relative paths — never absolute
files_produced: packages/nexus/src/pipeline/ (all phase files, knowledge-graph, symbol-table, pipeline orchestrator)

title: Context Rot & Token Budget Management
summary: Research on context rot mechanisms (lost-in-the-middle, attention dilution, distractor interference), full token cost audit of CLEO injection chain (~5869 tokens static baseline), token budget enforcement gaps in memory bridge, JIT memory injection design, and 6 recommendations for Memory Architecture v2.
key_findings: All 18 frontier models degrade with context length (Chroma 2025)
30%+ accuracy drop for middle-positioned content (Liu et al 2024)
CLEO static baseline costs ~5869 tokens before any task work
maxTokens budget not enforced in standard writeMemoryBridge() path
JIT injection + subagent isolation = the proven fix (90.2% improvement, Anthropic multi-agent)
Optimal budget target: ~2500-3000 tokens working context

summary: Comprehensive industry research on AI agent memory systems. Studied: Letta/MemGPT, Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Hindsight, LangMem, CrewAI, AutoGen, ChatGPT, A-Mem, SuperMemory, Mastra, MemOS. Key findings: (1) Hindsight achieves 91.4% LongMemEval via 4-strategy parallel retrieval + cross-encoder reranking. (2) Letta sleep-time compute enables async memory consolidation without live latency impact. (3) Zep bitemporal modeling (valid_at/invalid_at) enables fact invalidation and temporal audit. (4) Mem0 update-not-append pipeline prevents noise accumulation. (5) Context rot proven by Chroma 2025: every token added degrades attention — memory bridge must be token-budgeted. CLEO recommendations: add typed memory schema, temporal validity, dedup gate at write time, sleep-time consolidator, dual-strategy retrieval, token budget enforcement on memory bridge.
needs_followup: T549 implementation tasks for typed schema
Sleep-time consolidator implementation
Multi-strategy retrieval for cleo memory find
Token budget enforcement on refresh-memory

summary: Full audit of all memory/brain specs and ADRs for Memory Architecture v2. Covers: 1 primary spec (BRAIN-SPEC v3.1.0 AL2), 8 binding ADRs (ADR-006/009/011/013/021/032/034/036), 9 shipped brain.db tables, locked decisions, phase map (currently Phase 1), T523 completion state, and a clear permit/require-ADR/prohibited classification for all proposed v2 work. title: CLEO Memory Architecture Deep Audit
summary: Exhaustive audit of brain.db schema (10 tables including FTS5 virtual tables and vec0 embedding table), all write paths (observeBrain has 18 callers across hooks/CLI/lifecycle/session/sticky), all read paths (searchBrainCompact/hybridSearch/timelineBrain/fetchBrainEntries/traceBrainGraph/relatedBrainNodes/contextBrainNode/graphStats/searchDecisions/searchPatterns/searchLearnings/memoryBridge queries), full BrainConfig shape, lifecycle mechanics (decay only on learnings, consolidation on observations, no auto-scheduling), session/task integration (autoLinkObservationToTask fires on every observe call), CAAMP adapter memory behavior (no adapter-specific differences — all go through shared hook pipeline), and 8 identified gaps for tiered memory redesign.

title: CAAMP Multi-Harness Memory Audit — All 6 Providers
summary: Deep audit of CAAMP adapter system and memory injection across Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex, and Kimi. Documents per-adapter capabilities, injection patterns, 9 identified gaps, and recommendations. Memory does NOT work identically across providers — Claude Code is Tier 1 (full support), Kimi is Tier 5 (static-only, unverified). Three critical gaps: @-reference resolution unverified for 4 providers; Gemini/Codex/Kimi missing from registry.ts discovery; Codex canonical event naming wrong in capabilities.

title: Self-Healing & Intelligence Audit — Agent and Intelligence BRAIN Dimensions
key_findings: Agent self-healing building blocks are fully built (health-monitor, retry, capacity, execution-learning) but NO automated watchdog calls them
Intelligence prediction and gate-focus code is built in core but no CLI command group exists and no lifecycle hook triggers them
routing gap: orchestrate.spawn never consults capacity or specializations when selecting an agent
Proactive suggestion engine (13.4.4) and auto-remediation (13.4.3) are entirely unbuilt
Tiered memory tables (brain_patterns, brain_decisions, brain_learnings, brain_observations) are correctly written to but the feedback loop back into routing and suggestions is not closed
Watchers Engine and Impulse Engine are explicitly NOT BUILT per CLEO-AUTONOMOUS-RUNTIME-SPEC.md
Minimum viable path: daemon watchdog (item 1) + cleo intelligence CLI (item 5) + capacity routing in spawn (item 4)

summary: Concrete wiring spec for self-healing watchdog, routing integration, intelligence CLI, proactive hooks, and feedback loop. All sections grounded in actual function signatures and file paths.

title: Memory Extraction Pipeline — Full Design Spec
author: architect-subagent
summary: Full extraction pipeline design: ASCII flow diagram, per-source extraction rules, VerifyAndStore gate with cosine dedup + contradiction + confidence threshold, typed storage routing, sleep-time consolidation algorithm (7 steps), budget-aware retrieval with score fusion, instrumentation metrics, new file list and schema changes. Concrete function signatures throughout.

title: JIT Memory Injection + Context Window Management Spec
summary: Architecture spec for reducing static injection baseline from ~5,869 to ~1,850 tokens via JIT retrieval protocol, three-tier provider strategy, Memory Bridge v2 (compact/medium/rich modes), AGENTS.md rewrite, attention-optimal placement, and token budget enforcement fix.

title: Tiered + Typed Memory Architecture Specification
summary: Concrete spec for three-tier (short/medium/long) + three-type (semantic/episodic/procedural) memory model. Drizzle column definitions, migration SQL, tier routing logic, verification gate, bitemporal validity, consolidator pseudocode, BrainConfig extension, and migration path from flat model. All within permitted extension path — no new tables, ADR amendment required for governance.

Cross-validated all 4 architecture specs (CA1-CA4) against 3 research reports and the BRAIN Spec v3.1.0. Found 7 conflicts (2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 2 LOW severity) and 6 gaps. All are resolvable without scrapping any spec. Key resolutions: CA2 must adopt CA1 cognitive type vocabulary (semantic/episodic/procedural) with semanticSubtype disambiguation; citation_count column must be added to CA1 migration; CA1 bridge section budget is a content pool not an output limit (CA3 mode budgets govern output); CA4 intelligence alerts need a Section 0 priority slot in the bridge generator; CA2 new tables require ADR coverage. Unified 8-wave implementation plan produced with explicit dependencies. 26 ADR decisions consolidated into a single combined ADR amending ADR-009, ADR-021, and ADR-032.

title: Wave 0 schema foundation complete
summary: Added 7 new columns (memory_tier, memory_type, verified, valid_at, invalid_at, source_confidence, citation_count) to all 4 typed brain tables. Added BRAIN_MEMORY_TIERS, BRAIN_COGNITIVE_TYPES, BRAIN_SOURCE_CONFIDENCE constants to brain-schema.ts. Added BrainTieringConfig to contracts. Exported BrainMemoryTier, BrainCognitiveType, BrainSourceConfidence from contracts. Build and 396 test files pass.

title: Wave 1-A/B: Tier routing + quality scoring
summary: Wave 1-A: Updated observeBrain, storeDecision, storePattern, storeLearning to assign memoryTier/memoryType/sourceConfidence/verified at write time per spec §4.1 routing rules. Wave 1-B: Updated quality-scoring.ts with SOURCE_MULTIPLIERS (owner=1.0, task-outcome=0.9, agent=0.7, speculative=0.4), TIER_BONUS (short=0, medium=+0.05, long=+0.1), and applySourceMultiplier() applied as final transform in all 4 compute functions. All base formulas unchanged. Build and 7128 tests pass. 1 pre-existing flaky timing test unrelated to changes.

title: Wave 4: Intelligence CLI + Watchdog Scheduler Wired
summary: Wired the intelligence CLI command group (cleo intelligence predict/suggest/learn-errors/confidence/match) and the watchdog scheduler (60s periodic health-check via SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks). Added IntelligenceHandler dispatch domain and registerIntelligenceCommand CLI registration. Added missing getBrainAccessor + adaptive-validation exports to core internal.ts. Build passes, zero new test failures.

title: Wave 2: Extraction gate + contradiction detection
summary: Built extraction-gate.ts: MemoryCandidate interface, GateResult interface, three-check verification pipeline (A: content-hash dedup, B: cosine similarity + polarity-flip contradiction detection, C: confidence threshold 0.40), trusted source bypass for manual/owner sources, invalidateEntry/incrementCitationCount helpers routing by ID prefix, storeVerifiedCandidate routing semantic/episodic/procedural to correct brain tables, verifyAndStore + verifyAndStoreBatch convenience functions, supersedes graph edge on contradiction. Exported from memory/index.ts. Build passes, 396 test files, 7129 tests, 0 new failures.

title: CAAMP injection wired for nexus-bridge + JIT
summary: Added @.cleo/nexus-bridge.md to CAAMP injection block, JIT memory protocol to CLEO-INJECTION.md template, stripGitNexusBlocks() to remove hardcoded gitnexus blocks, and checkNexusBridge() doctor check. All quality gates pass.

title: Wave 3: Consolidator + tier promotion + budget retrieval
summary: Wave 3-B: runTierPromotion() — short→medium (citationCount>=3 or quality>=0.7, verified, age>24h), medium→long (citationCount>=5, verified, age>7d), soft-evict stale short entries. Wave 3-C: brain-consolidator.ts detectContradictions() — keyword overlap + negation polarity flip heuristic, creates contradicts graph edges, lowers quality of contradicted entry. Wave 3-D: runConsolidation() — 7-step pipeline (dedup, quality recompute, tier promotion, contradiction detection, soft eviction, graph edge strengthening, summary generation). Wave 3-E: session-hooks.ts handleSessionEndConsolidation registered at priority 5 with setImmediate fire-and-forget. Wave 3-A: retrieveWithBudget() — FTS50%+vec40%+graph10% fusion, budget enforcement, citation tracking. All quality gates pass: 396 test files, 7129 tests, 0 new failures.

title: Waves 5+6: JIT commands + routing integration
summary: Wave 5-A: cleo context pull <taskId> — JIT context bundle (task+top3 brain+handoff, ~400 tokens). New admin.context.pull dispatch op + registry entry. Wave 5-D/E: intelligence-hooks.ts on PreToolUse calculates task risk; stores discovery observation if riskScore>=0.8. Wave 6-C/D: capacity-aware routing in orchestrateSpawnExecute — findLeastLoadedAgent attached as preferredAgent hint before spawn, best-effort. All quality gates pass: 396 test files, 7130 tests, 0 new failures.

Deep audit of Pi integration, CAAMP hook taxonomy, and adapter architecture. Pi has 0% hook coverage in hook-mappings.json despite being primary harness. 9 actionable gaps identified. PiHarness implementation is excellent but CAAMP hook-mappings.json and packages/adapters have no Pi entry. Session lifecycle wiring (session_start/shutdown → cleo CLI) is missing. Full canonical-to-Pi event mapping provided for all 16 events.
needs_followup: Add Pi to hook-mappings.json providerMappings
Create packages/adapters/src/providers/pi/
Wire session_shutdown to cleo session end in cleo-cant-bridge.ts
Add session_start to cleo session start lifecycle call
Fix registry.ts PROVIDER_IDS to include gemini-cli/codex/kimi

title: Pi adapter with 11/16 CAAMP hook coverage

summary: Fixed cleo nexus context and nexus impact silently ignoring --json flag. Root cause: shimToCitty passed numeric defaultValue (e.g. 20) for string-type citty args, causing citty parser to dump remaining argv tokens (including --json) into _ instead of parsing them. Fix: stringify numeric defaults before assigning to citty arg def. Affects 4 nexus subcommands with required positionals + parseInt defaults. Commit b9835914. All 7130 tests pass.

title: Fresh Agent v2 Test Report — 9/10
summary: Fresh agent v2 test: 9/10 (up from 5/10). T1 project identity, T2 task rec, T3 nexus clusters, T4 memory graph, T7 briefing, T8 memory bridge, T9 nexus bridge, T10 five-call productivity all score 1.0. T5 context pull partial (type field unknown). T6 nexus context partial (processes empty). Agent productive in 5 calls: YES.

Fixed two bugs: (1) Brain.db missing columns from T528/T531/T549 migrations — root cause was migration SQL files blocked by gitignore and never committed to git. Fix: force-added 3 migration SQL files to git AND added ensureColumns() safety net in runBrainMigrations() after migrateWithRetry(). Covers quality_score (T531), brain_page_nodes expansion (T528), and all 7 T549 columns (memory_tier, memory_type, verified, valid_at, invalid_at, source_confidence, citation_count). valid_at uses plain text DDL in ensureColumns (no datetime now default) to avoid SQLite non-constant default constraint on non-empty tables. (2) CI failures: all shard-1 test failures (brain-migration.test.ts, decisions.test.ts, embedding-pipeline.test.ts) were caused by Bug 1. Now resolved. 396/396 test files pass locally, CI push triggered commit b22043eb.
